rules: Use Playfair Display for all major section headers and hero typography (tracking-tight).
Use Manrope for body text, dashboard UI, and smaller labels.
For massive numbers in the manifesto, use Playfair Display italic or ultra-light.
No full-screen standard gradients. Rely on pure high-contrast flat sections.
Use #FF3B30 (Vermilion) purely for kinetic triggers, active states, and small structural accents.
For light mode sections (like Manifesto), invert background to #F4F4F0 and text to #0A0A0A.

textures: Subtle film grain overlay across the entire app (pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay, opacity 30%).
surface_strategies: Crystal Glass for the sticky nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a 1px border-white/10.
Grid Borders for dashboard and auth screens: 1px subtle borders (border-collapse look) instead of floating cards.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis for momentum scrolling. A must for the editorial feel.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Framer Motion. All sections must use scroll-triggered entry (fade up + slight scale).
motion_and_interactions.hero_moment: Masked line-by-line text reveal for the 'CR8' wordmark. Oversized text (text-[15vw] or clamp). Uses framer-motion 'initial={{ y: 100% }} animate={{ y: 0 }}' wrapped in an overflow-hidden mask.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images in grids get a slight scale-up (scale-105) and a spotlight/color saturation bump on hover.

marketing_page.description: Massive kinetic CR8 wordmark. Line-by-line reveal. Background uses a subtle dark film grain texture and a clipped spotlight image of a fashion model.
Slow, smooth infinite scroll using react-fast-marquee. 'THE OWNERS ✦ THE INFLUENCERS ✦' repeated in a serif font.
Chapters 01, 02, 03 describing the bridge. Huge oversized numerals. Text-heavy editorial layout. Alternating left/right alignment.
50/50 vertical split. Left side 'For Owners', Right side 'For Influencers'. Hovering one side dynamically expands its flex basis using Framer Motion.
Bento 'Tetris' Grid. Real photography treated deliberately with clipped frames and dark overlays that reveal on hover.
marketing_page.grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix of col-span-4 and col-span-8.

dashboard_and_auth.description: Split screen layout. Left side editorial image, right side clean, high-density Swiss form for role selection.
dashboard_and_auth.styling: Input fields use bottom border only, or strict 1px rectangles. No soft shadows.

dashboard_and_auth.description: Cardless, dense data presentation. Strict grid hierarchy. 1px borders between widgets. Neutral/monochrome palette with accent color for status.

shadcn: Use Shadcn UI for standard interactions (Select, Dialog, Form, Tabs) but strip Vercel-look borders and shadows.
Make them strictly rectangular (rounded-none) or maximum rounded-sm to match the editorial aesthetic.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card component for marketing sections; use raw HTML/Tailwind for custom layouts.
component_instructions.toasts: Use 'sonner' for toasts. Style them dark and minimal.
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react for UI, or @phosphor-icons/react for thinner, editorial line weights.

creators_and_influencers.description: Stylish portrait of a woman in a black dress with dramatic lighting.
Woman in a brown coat holding a black purse.
Woman standing next to a chair wearing a skirt.

brands_and_campaigns.description: Bottles of makeup on white table.
Plant in a vase, luxury lifestyle.

textures_and_backgrounds.description: Black and white film grain texture.
textures_and_backgrounds.category: Global app overlay / Dark section backgrounds
Accent glowing background for hover states or 3D moments

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: DO NOT output TSX. Use .js extensions for all files.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case format.
Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for the header or floating navs; use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) or solid colors.
Avoid the generic 'AI slop' aesthetic: no simplistic gradients, no generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements, absolute positioning, and typography scaling.
Never apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Add specific transitions for interactive elements.
Do NOT center align the app container using .App { text-align: center; }.
Use generous padding (p-12, p-24, p-32) on marketing sections.
Ensure high contrast and readability on all text. Use APCA contrast principles.
Use Framer Motion for scroll-linked animations and page load reveals.
